about.title: About Flyttella
about.description1: Flyttella is a moving and cleaning company based in Stockholm that was founded with the goal of making moves and cleaning services easier, safer and more transparent. We have been in business for 5 years, but have over 8 years of experience in the industry - something that is reflected in our way of working, our quality and our satisfied customers.
about.description2: So far, we have had the pleasure of helping over 8000 customers, both individuals and companies, with everything from small moves to complete solutions with cleaning, packing and advice. What makes us unique is our focus on clear terms and fixed prices - with us you always know what's included and what it costs.
about.description3: We offer free loan of moving boxes, free rescheduling and cancellation up to 24 hours before, as well as a generous 14-day guarantee on all moving cleanings. Behind all this stands our competent and personal customer service, which is always available to answer questions, give tips and help you make the right decision.

features.title: Our Advantages
features.fixedPriceDesc: No surprises - we offer both fixed prices and the possibility of ongoing prices
features.rutDeductionDesc: We handle all paperwork for RUT deduction
features.freeBoxes: Free loan of boxes for 4 weeks
features.freeBoxesDesc: Custom-made moving boxes with our logo
features.reschedule: Reschedule or cancel free of charge
features.rescheduleDesc: Reschedule or cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before the move
features.insuranceDesc: All necessary permits and insurance in place
features.trainedStaffDesc: Our staff is trained to ensure the highest quality and service.
features.managementDesc: We work with efficient management systems to guarantee structure and quality.
features.workplaceDesc: We prioritize a safe and secure work environment for both customers and staff.

reviews.title: What do our customers think of us?
reviews.subtitle: A safe and professional moving experience
reviews.description: As one of Sweden's most recommended moving companies, we put the customer first. We understand that moving can be stressful, so we strive to make the process as smooth and safe as possible. With our experience and dedicated team, we ensure your move is a positive experience from start to finish.
reviews.badgeAlt: 5 years of experience as a moving company
reviews.arrowText: See what our customers say about us

cta.title: Ready to start your move?
cta.subtitle: Get a quick and free quote on your move

form.title: Get a free quote
form.movingService: Complete moving service with professional packing, transport and cleaning

process.title: Our Process
process.description: Our moving process is designed to be simple, transparent, and secure. It starts with you filling out our form on the homepage where you provide your details and moving needs. Within one minute, you'll receive a quote sent to your specified email address. The same day or the next day, we'll personally contact you to discuss the details and answer any questions. When you're satisfied with the quote, you can easily sign it digitally. Then we carry out the move according to your wishes and agreement. The result? A satisfied customer who can focus on coming home to their new home.
process.fixedPrice: We work with fixed prices to give you security and transparency.
process.customQuote: Our quotes are always based on your specific needs and circumstances.
process.permits: As a serious moving company, we have all necessary permits, tax certificates, and insurance in place.

steps.title: Personal contact
steps.desc: We call the same day or the next

aboutSection.title: Our Experience
aboutSection.localExperienceDesc1: With over 8,000 moves and 7,000 cleanings behind us, we have built up unique expertise in the moving and cleaning industry. Our experience extends across the country and we have helped thousands of families and companies with their moves.
aboutSection.localExperienceDesc2: Our achievements have earned us recognition as one of Sweden's most reliable moving companies, with over 1,000 positive reviews and recommendations from satisfied customers. We are proud to offer professional moving services based on years of practical experience.

hero.title: Household Moving
hero.subtitle: Let us take care of your entire move. With our professional household moving service, you get a worry-free moving experience from start to finish.
hero.description: We perform large and small household moves every day! It's our proud profession to safely and efficiently move things from one place to another at a competitive fixed price.

packing.title: Packing & Unpacking
packing.description: We pack your belongings safely and professionally with the right materials and techniques.

transport.title: Safe Transport
transport.description: Modern moving trucks and experienced movers ensure safe transport of your belongings.

materials.title: Moving Materials
materials.description: We provide all the moving materials needed for a safe move.

assembly.title: Disassembly & Assembly
assembly.description: We help you disassemble and assemble furniture when needed.

content.intro: Are you moving from one home to another? Let us at Flyttella take care of your move, we perform large and small household moves every day! It's our proud profession to safely and efficiently move things from one place to another at a competitive fixed price.
content.expertise: We know that a household move can feel complicated and difficult, but helping you move is our area of expertise.
content.quality: If you're looking for quality moving help at reasonable prices, then you've come to the right place! After many years in the industry, we can promise you reliable service at a low price. Moving should be simple, and we make sure it is.
content.comprehensive: It doesn't matter if it's an apartment, summer house, or an entire villa! We help you with the entire process! From disassembly, packing, packaging, transportation, unpacking to furniture placement.
content.customized: Tell us what you need help with, and we'll find a smart solution tailored to your specific wishes.

process.title: Our Process
process.description: Our moving process is designed to be simple, transparent, and secure. It starts with you filling out our form on the homepage where you provide your details and moving needs. Within one minute, you'll receive a quote sent to your specified email address. The same day or the next day, we'll personally contact you to discuss the details and answer any questions. When you're satisfied with the quote, you can easily sign it digitally. Then we carry out the move according to your wishes and agreement. The result? A satisfied customer who can focus on coming home to their new home.
process.pricing: Our quotes are always based on your specific needs and circumstances. We take into account factors such as living area, floor, elevator, and parking distance to give you a quote that fits your specific situation. We can also inspect the property if needed. All prices are fixed without hidden fees - we always base our work on your wishes and information we receive from you as a customer. Do you have special wishes or questions? Contact us and we'll adapt the quote to your needs.

whatIs.title: What is household moving?
whatIs.subtitle: A complete guide to household moving
whatIs.description: Household moving is the relocation of all your belongings from one home to another. It includes everything from small items to large furniture and electronics. We take care of the entire process from start to finish.

sections.title: What's included in household moving?
sections.content: A complete household move includes packing all your belongings, safe transport with modern moving trucks, and unpacking at the new location. We handle everything from small details to large furniture with professional care.

sections.title: For which types of properties?
sections.content: We perform household moves for all types of properties - apartments, houses, summer houses, and offices. Regardless of size or type of property, we can adapt our service to your specific needs.

sections.title: Our professional approach
sections.content: With over 8 years of experience in the industry, we know exactly what's required for a smooth household move. We use the right materials, techniques, and personnel to ensure your belongings arrive safely and undamaged.

sections.title: Benefits of our household moving service
sections.content: We offer fixed prices, insurance of all belongings, and professional service from start to finish. You also get free loan of moving boxes and free rescheduling up to 24 hours before the move.

hero.title: Professional move-out cleaning
hero.subtitle: Let our experienced team handle the cleaning
hero.description: We guarantee a thorough move-out cleaning that meets all requirements. Our professional cleaning service ensures your old home is left in perfect condition.

hero.title: Professional home cleaning in Stockholm
hero.subtitle: Regular cleaning tailored to your needs
hero.description: Reliable and thorough home cleaning with RUT deduction and satisfaction guarantee. Get a quote in 1 minute.

hero.title: Moving Help
hero.subtitle: Professional moving help for moving, furniture and heavy items in Stockholm.
hero.description: We offer reliable moving help for all types of moves and transport. Our experienced staff help you carry furniture, moving boxes and other heavy items safely and efficiently.
hero.ctaDescription: Tell us briefly what you need help with and we'll get back to you quickly with price and time. We can also inspect on site if needed.

content.whatIsDescription: Moving help means we help you carry heavy items, furniture and moving boxes in a safe and efficient way. We can help you with everything from small furniture to large, heavy items like pianos, safes and special equipment. The service is suitable for moving, office moves or when you just need help moving heavy items.
content.pricingDescription1: The price for moving help depends mainly on the number of items, weight and size, accessibility (floor, elevator, carrying distance), and how far the transport is. We always provide a clear fixed price without hidden fees before we start work. If needed, we can do a quick inspection on site or assess based on pictures.
content.pricingDescription2: Send a request with a brief description and preferably pictures and we'll get back to you quickly with a fixed price.
content.pricingTestimonial: Perfect moving help! They came on time, were professional and took care of everything safely. I warmly recommend Flyttella for anyone who needs moving help!
content.includesDescription: With our moving help, you get help carrying from home, attic, basement or office. We can also assist with simple disassembly of furniture if needed and ensure that all items are handled safely and securely. All at clear, fixed prices without hidden fees.
content.bookingTitle: How do I book moving help?
content.bookingDescription: Book moving help easily by contacting us. We offer quick service and flexible times that suit you. For a faster quote, please provide address, floor and if there's an elevator, approximate amount and type of items (e.g. furniture, piano, safe), as well as desired date and time. You can also attach pictures in the message so we can assess the volume directly. We'll get back to you quickly with price and confirmation. If needed, we can also do a short inspection on site before moving help.

about.title: About Flyttella
about.description1: Flyttella is Stockholm's leading company for professional moving help and moving services. With over 8 years of experience, we help both individuals and companies with safe and efficient moving help of furniture, moving boxes and heavy items throughout Stockholm.
about.description2: Our team of experienced movers and moving helpers specialize in handling all types of items - from small furniture to large, heavy items like pianos and safes. We use modern equipment and follow strict safety guidelines to ensure everything is handled correctly and safely.
about.description3: As part of our comprehensive moving services, we also offer disposal, assembly, piano and heavy lifting as well as office moves. Our goal is to make moving help simple, safe and efficient for all our customers in Stockholm with transparent prices and professional service.

reviews.title: What do our customers think of us?
reviews.subtitle: A safe and professional moving help
reviews.description: We have helped thousands of customers with safe and professional moving help of furniture and heavy items. Our customers appreciate our fast service, transparent prices and professional handling of everything from small furniture to large, heavy items like pianos and safes. At Flyttella you get professional moving help with focus on customer satisfaction and safety.

cta.title: Ready to book your moving help?
cta.subtitle: Get a quick and free quote on your moving help

flyttstadning.title: Moving Cleaning
flyttstadning.description: We guarantee a thorough moving cleaning that meets all requirements. Our professional cleaning service ensures your old home is left in perfect condition.
flyttstadning.descriptionExtended: Our moving cleaning follows established industry standards and includes everything from kitchen and bathroom to window cleaning and details. We use eco-friendly products and provide a 14-day cleaning guarantee so you can feel completely secure.

bohagsflytt.title: Household Moving
bohagsflytt.description: Professional move of your entire household. We take care of everything from small furniture to large pianos with care and precision.
bohagsflytt.descriptionExtended: We offer packing and unpacking as well as assembly and disassembly of furniture - everything to make your move as simple and comfortable as possible. We use quality materials and have experience with all types of moves. With our service you get a stress-free move where everything is handled professionally.

magasinering.title: Storage
magasinering.description: Secure storage of your household goods in dry, alarmed spaces. We can also help you with packing before we store your things, always with focus on safe and careful handling.
magasinering.descriptionMobile: We help with labeling and organization for easier return delivery.
magasinering.descriptionExtended: Storage is perfect for moving, renovation or longer stays abroad. Our experienced staff use quality packing materials and ensure everything is packed correctly for long-term storage. We can also help with labeling of boxes and inventory list for smooth return delivery.

allServices.title: Our services
allServices.description: We offer a complete range of moving and cleaning services to make your move and cleaning as smooth as possible. From household moving and moving cleaning to special services like heavy lifting and storage.

experience.title: Our experience
experience.localExperienceDesc1: We have helped thousands of customers with their moving help in Stockholm and the surrounding area. Our local knowledge and experience ensures we can handle all types of moving help, from small furniture to large, heavy items like pianos and safes.
experience.localExperienceDesc2: With over 8 years of experience, we have built a reputation for quality, reliability and customer satisfaction. We understand the local conditions and can offer tailored solutions for all needs.

We take into account factors such as amount of items, type of furniture, accessibility and transport distance to give you a quote that fits your specific situation. We can also inspect the site if needed. All prices are fixed without hidden fees - we always base our work on your wishes and information we receive from you as a customer. Do you have special wishes or questions? Contact us and we'll adapt the quote to your needs.

blog.title: Read more about moving help in Stockholm
blog.subtitle: Get valuable tips and advice for smooth moving help
blog.postTitle: What should you think about before moving help with furniture and heavy items
blog.postDescription: Right planning makes moving help simple and safe. We go through important steps - from preparation and accessibility to safe handling and professional service.

questions.question: How do I best prepare for moving help?
questions.answer: Start by sorting your items and marking what should be moved. Remove all loose items from the area that will be used. Make sure we have access to the area. If you have particularly sensitive or valuable items, mark these clearly and tell us.

questions.question: What is usually included in moving help?
questions.answer: Moving help means we help you carry items from e.g. home, attic, basement or office. We always use proper protective and safety equipment to handle everything safely.

questions.question: How does safety handling work during moving help?
questions.answer: We follow strict safety guidelines and use appropriate protective equipment. For heavy items we use special equipment like dollies, lifting straps and protection. We document all handling and ensure nothing is damaged during transport.

questions.question: How long does moving help take and what affects the time required?
questions.answer: The time required depends on several factors: the amount of items, accessibility to the area, need for special equipment. How long moving help takes depends entirely on the scope and your specific needs. We always adapt the work to the situation to provide smooth and safe handling.

questions.question: Can you handle all types of items?
questions.answer: We handle most types of items including furniture, moving boxes, pianos, safes and large appliances. For particularly sensitive or valuable items we can offer extra protection.

magasinering.title: Storage
magasinering.description: Secure storage of your household goods in dry, alarmed spaces. We can also help you with packing before we store your things, always with focus on safe and careful handling.

montering.title: Assembly
montering.description: Assembly and disassembly of furniture and interior - right tools and careful handling.

tunglyft.title: Heavy Lifting
tunglyft.description: Safe handling of heavy and large-scale items like pianos, safes and large furniture.

hero.title: Piano & Heavy Lifting
hero.subtitle: Professional handling of heavy and large-scale items
hero.description: We move pianos, safes and large furniture with precision and safety. Specialized equipment and experienced staff.

content.whatIsDescription: Piano & heavy lifting means professional handling of heavy and large-scale items that require specialized equipment and experience. We move pianos, safes, gun safes and other heavy furniture with precision and safety. The service is suitable for moving, renovation or when you need to move heavy items that cannot be handled with regular moving methodology.
content.pricingTitle: What does piano & heavy lifting cost?
content.pricingDescription1: The price for piano & heavy lifting depends mainly on the type of item, weight, accessibility (floor, elevator, carrying distance), and how far the transport is. We always provide a clear fixed price without hidden fees before we start work. If needed, we can do a quick inspection on site or assess based on pictures.
content.pricingDescription2: Send a request with a brief description and preferably pictures and we'll get back to you quickly with a fixed price.
content.pricingTestimonial: Perfect piano & heavy lifting! They came on time, were professional and took care of everything safely. I warmly recommend Flyttella for anyone who needs help with heavy items!
content.includesDescription: Our piano & heavy lifting includes on-site inspection, specialized equipment such as piano trolleys and protection, moving help with experienced staff, safe transport and delivery. We handle all types of heavy items from pianos and safes to antiques and sculptures. All at clear, fixed prices without hidden fees.
content.bookingTitle: How do I book piano & heavy lifting?
content.bookingDescription: Book piano & heavy lifting easily by contacting us. We offer quick service and flexible times that suit you. For a faster quote, please provide address, floor and if there's an elevator, type of item (piano, safe, etc.), as well as desired date and time. You can also attach pictures in the message so we can assess the volume directly. We'll get back to you quickly with price and confirmation. If needed, we can also do a short inspection on site before heavy lifting.

about.title: About Flyttella
about.description1: Flyttella is a moving and cleaning company in Stockholm that specializes in piano & heavy lifting. For over eight years, we have helped customers move heavy and large-scale items with precision and safety. Our experienced staff use specialized equipment and techniques to handle all types of heavy items, from pianos and safes to antiques and sculptures.
about.description2: We offer complete service with on-site inspection, safe transport and delivery. With clear terms and fixed arrangements, you know exactly what's included. Our team is always available for questions and support throughout the process, and we ensure that every heavy lifting is carried out with the highest safety and precision.
about.description3: Need help with piano & heavy lifting, contact us for a quick and free quote. We can also combine the service with moving cleaning, packing or other moving-related services for a complete solution.

questions.question: How do I best prepare for piano & heavy lifting?
questions.answer: Start by marking the area around the item and removing all loose items. Make sure we have access to the area and that no obstacles are in the way. If you have particularly sensitive or valuable items, mark these clearly and tell us.

questions.question: What is usually included in piano & heavy lifting?
questions.answer: Piano & heavy lifting means we help you move heavy items with specialized equipment and techniques. We always use proper protective and safety equipment to handle everything safely.

questions.question: How does safety handling work during piano & heavy lifting?
questions.answer: We follow strict safety guidelines and use appropriate protective equipment. For heavy items we use special equipment like piano trolleys, lifting straps and protection. We document all handling and ensure nothing is damaged during transport.

questions.question: How long does piano & heavy lifting take and what affects the time required?
questions.answer: The time required depends on several factors: type of item, accessibility to the area, need for special equipment. questions.question: How do I best prepare for waste disposal?
questions.answer: Start by sorting and separating different types of waste. Remove all loose items and make sure we have access to the area. Make sure there's room for our vehicles and that we can access with equipment. Mark any particularly sensitive or valuable items clearly.

questions.question: How does environmental handling work during waste disposal?

questions.question: How long does waste disposal take and what affects the time required?

How long waste disposal takes depends entirely on the scope and your specific needs. We always adapt the work to the situation to provide smooth and safe handling.

questions.question: Can you handle all types of waste?

content.whatIsDescription: Storage means storing household goods or inventory safely for a period – during moving, renovation, overseas stay or space shortage. The storage should be dry, ventilated and protected against theft and damage. Often the household goods are collected from the customer, packed with protection and transported to an alarmed warehouse. When you want return delivery, the household goods are delivered again. Common options are packing help, assembly/disassembly, extra insurance and the possibility to access selected boxes during the period.
content.pricingDescription: Price depends on volume (cubic meters), storage time, accessibility and any options such as collection/return delivery, packing help and extra insurance. Billing is often per cubic and month. A guideline is that the cost can be reduced by clearing in advance, packing efficiently and choosing longer binding time. Transparency is important – ask for a clear quote with what's included such as rent, insurance, handling and any start-up fees.
content.pricingTestimonial: Safe and smooth storage – easy to both drop off and get back.
content.includesDescription: Storage usually includes collection of household goods, safe packing with protection, transport to alarmed warehouse, storage during agreed time and return delivery. We can also offer packing help, assembly/disassembly of furniture, extra insurance and the possibility to access selected boxes during the period. All at clear, fixed prices without hidden fees.
content.bookingDescription: Book storage easily by contacting us. We offer quick service and flexible times that suit you. For a faster quote, please provide address, approximate volume (cubic meters), desired storage time, and any options such as packing help or extra insurance. We can also inspect on site for a more accurate assessment. We'll get back to you quickly with price and confirmation.

hero.title: International Moving from Stockholm
hero.subtitle: International moving – secure planning, packing and transport
hero.description: We help you through the entire move – from planning and preparation to secure handling and delivery. Our goal is to make the process simple, safe and smooth for you. Fill out the form and get a quote in just one minute.

content.whatIsDescription: International moving is the relocation of household goods across a national border, often between different regulations and languages. Compared to domestic moving, it requires longer lead times, more documentation and consideration of customs and import rules, insurance conditions, road and border controls as well as time differences and holidays in several countries. Typical steps include cleaning and inventory of household goods, long-distance adapted packing, creation of inventory lists and customs values, planning of routes and delivery windows as well as receiving control at the destination. Lead times are usually longer than for domestic moving and it is wise to plan with buffer for border crossings and unforeseen events.
content.pricingDescription: The price depends mainly on volume (cubic), destination, accessibility at the addresses (floor, elevator, carrying distance) and options such as packing, storage and assembly/disassembly. Distance, bridge and road fees as well as desired delivery windows also affect the total price. Pricing is usually done as a fixed price or variable price. Fixed price means a total sum for a clearly defined scope (volume, addresses, carrying distance, time windows) and does not change as long as the conditions match – predictable and easy to budget. Variable price is charged per time/volume or according to running billing based on actual effort and possible additions – flexible with uncertain scope, but the final cost may vary. In both cases, the price may include materials, working time, transport, insurance and sometimes customs-related costs. The cost can often be reduced by reducing the volume (cleaning), being flexible with dates and ensuring good accessibility/parking.
content.pricingTestimonial: Safe and smooth international move – Flyttella had clear communication all the way.
content.includesTitle: What is included in international moving?
content.includesDescription: Inventory and planning, loading with furniture protection, insurance, international road transport and unloading at destination. We coordinate carrying distance and delivery windows and do a simple receiving control. Options: packing of the entire home, storage, assembly/disassembly and moving cleaning before handover.
content.bookingTitle: How do I book international moving?
content.bookingDescription: Book via the form – specify address, volume and destination. You get a price directly and can confirm digitally. We contact you the same day or next business day to coordinate details, desired dates and any options. We offer package solutions for the best price.
checklistItems: Book moving company in good time: Ensure you get the date that suits you best.
Clean and sort: Go through your things and throw away, sell or donate what you don't need.
Order moving boxes: Borrow or buy enough boxes and packing materials.
Pack smart: Mark boxes with content and room. Pack heavy things in small boxes and light things in large ones. We also offer packing help as an option - contact us for more information.
Change address and notify important contacts: Report move to Tax Agency, insurance company, bank, electricity company and other suppliers.
Book moving cleaning: Make sure the home is properly cleaned before handover.
Take down curtains, lamps and shelves: Prepare as much as possible before moving day.
Pack a "first night box": Put in the most important: clothes, toiletries, chargers and important papers.
Double check everything on moving day: Check that nothing is left, that all windows and doors are locked and that keys are left according to agreement.
Passport, visa and residence permit: Ensure validity and right certificates for everyone in the household.
Inventory list and customs values: List household goods and prepare customs values according to destination country's requirements.
Import rules: Check what can be brought in (e.g. food, plants, batteries) and if permits are required.
International insurance: Make sure the insurance covers long-distance road transport and the entire moving chain.
Parking and carrying distance: Arrange loading zone/permit and elevator booking at both addresses.
Pets: Check veterinary certificates, vaccinations and import requirements.

For over eight years, we have helped customers move between countries – with clear steps, secure planning and the same high quality as a local move. Our goal is to make international moves simple, predictable and transparent.

questions.question: Is packing included?

If the moving dates don't coincide, or if you temporarily need to store your household goods, we ensure that everything is stored safely in our dry, ventilated and alarmed facilities. This way you can feel secure that your belongings are in good storage until it's time for transport further to your new address abroad. We adapt the solution completely to your needs and ensure that the process becomes smooth from start to finish.

What makes us unique is our focus on clear terms and fixed prices – with us you always know what's included and what it costs.

process.title: Our assembly process
process.description: Our assembly process is designed to be simple, safe and professional. We follow strict guidelines to ensure that all assembly is performed correctly and with the highest quality.
process.pricingInfo: Our quotes are always based on your specific needs and circumstances. We consider factors such as type of assembly, complexity, accessibility and materials to give you a quote that fits your situation. We can also inspect the site if needed. Our prices are without any hidden fees - we always base on your wishes and information we get from you as a customer. Do you have special wishes or questions? Contact us and we'll adapt the quote to your needs.

post.title: What should you think about before assembly of furniture and furnishings
post.description: Right planning makes assembly easy and safe. We go through important steps - from preparations and tools to professional handling and safe installation.

questions.question: How do I best prepare for assembly?
questions.answer: Start by clearing the area where the assembly should take place. Make sure all parts and instructions are available. Check that there is enough space to work. If you have special wishes or preferences, write them down so we can follow them.

questions.question: What is usually included in an assembly?
questions.answer: An assembly usually includes assembly of furniture, installation of hardware and possible adjustment. We follow the instructions carefully and make sure everything is secure and works as it should. We can also offer additional services such as moving furniture or cleaning.

questions.question: How does quality control work for assembly?
questions.answer: We check every step in the assembly process to ensure everything is correctly assembled. We test functionality and adjust if needed. We document all work and give you a walkthrough of the finished result.

questions.question: How long does an assembly take and what affects the time?
questions.answer: The time depends on several factors: the complexity of the furniture, the number of furniture, accessibility to the area and any special requirements. A normal assembly usually takes a few hours, but larger projects can take a whole day.

questions.question: Can you handle all types of assembly tasks?
questions.answer: We handle most types of assembly tasks including IKEA furniture, kitchen fittings, wardrobes and special furniture. We have experience with both simple and complex assembly tasks. For particularly sensitive or valuable furniture, we can offer extra care and precision.

tunglyft.title: Heavy lifting

hero.title: Household Moving
hero.subtitle: Complete moving service for the entire household. We help you with everything from planning and packing to transport and unpacking.
hero.description: Professional household moving that makes your move as smooth as possible. With us, you can be confident about your belongings and your wallet.

content.whatIsDescription: Household moving involves moving all or parts of a household's belongings from one residence to another. It includes everything from planning, packing and transport to unpacking and possible storage.
content.whyChooseTitle: Why choose us for your household move?
content.whyChooseDescription: We have over 15 years of experience with household moves in Stockholm and have helped thousands of customers with their moves. Our team of professional movers ensures that your move becomes as smooth and secure as possible.
content.pricingTitle: What does a household move cost?
content.pricingDescription: The price of a household move varies depending on factors such as the amount of belongings, the distance between addresses, floor level, access to elevator and any additional services such as packing or storage. A normal move within the same city can cost from about 1,700 SEK and up. To get an exact price, we recommend that you request a free quote tailored to your needs.
content.testimonial: Everything went smoothly and safely from first contact until everything was in place. Highly recommend Flyttella to everyone who wants a worry-free move!
content.bohag2010Description: Household moving 2010 refers to the rules and guidelines established in "Bohag 2010" – an agreement developed by Sweden's Haulage Companies and Swedish Furniture Transporters' Association. The agreement regulates the responsibility between moving companies and customers in household moving, and ensures that the move takes place in a safe and professional manner. It includes among other things insurance, handling of belongings, complaints and payment terms. When you hire a moving company that follows Bohag 2010, you can feel extra secure throughout the entire moving process.
content.boxesDescription: Moving boxes are an important part of a smooth and safe household move. With the right boxes, packing becomes easier and your things are better protected during transport. We offer stable and spacious moving boxes that are adapted for different types of items – from books and porcelain to clothes and electronics. With us, you can borrow moving boxes free of charge for up to 4 weeks when you book your move, which makes the entire process both easier and more cost-effective.
content.bookingTitle: Book moving help in good time
content.bookingDescription: For a smooth and stress-free move, it's important to book moving help in good time. We recommend that you book at least 2-3 weeks in advance to ensure availability and get the moving day that suits you best. We offer flexible booking options and can adapt to your needs. Book today to ensure a professional and reliable moving service.

about.quality: We offer free loan of moving boxes, free rebooking and cancellation up to 24 hours before, as well as a generous 14-day guarantee on all moving cleaning. Behind all this stands our competent and personal customer service, which is always available to answer questions, give tips and help you make the right decision.
about.customerFocus: The customer is always at the center. We listen to your wishes and needs, and adapt our service accordingly. Whether you're moving within the same city or to a new location, we're here to help you.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about household moving

questions.question: What is included in a household move?
questions.answer: A household move includes everything from planning and packing to transport and unpacking. We help you inventory your belongings, pack safely with the right materials, transport everything to your new address and help you unpack and set up the furniture.

questions.question: How far in advance should I book?
questions.answer: We recommend that you book at least 2-3 weeks in advance, especially during peak season (May-September). For smaller moves, we can often help you even with shorter notice, but it depends on our availability.

questions.question: What does a household move cost?
questions.answer: The cost of a household move depends on several factors such as distance, volume, number of movers and any additional services. We always give you a fixed price without hidden costs when we make the quote.

questions.question: Do you have insurance?
questions.answer: Yes, we have full insurance that covers damage that may occur during the move. If something breaks due to our handling, we replace it. It's also important to note that we follow industry standards to minimize the risk of damage.

questions.question: Can you help with packing?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer complete packing help that includes packing, transport and unpacking. We have all the necessary materials and can help you with the entire process from start to finish.
